creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please do the following TWO repocopies:

devel/bazaar --> devel/baz
devel/bazaar-ng --> devel/bzr

The reasons and discussions with the respective maintainers are in PR ports/163046. Main reason: devel/bazaar is outdated by devel/bazaar-ng for years now which confuses many first-time users.
